notes:
Ember 1.9.3 — Fixed Sandbox/Scan-folder buttons, Ember Link tablet mode, permission prompts

• Fixed 'Sandbox' and 'Scan a folder' in the Command Center showing 'not available in this build' — they were wired to methods that lived on the wrong dialog class.
• Ember Link's non-fullscreen mirror was rendering at a fraction of its intended size (a layout regression) — fixed.
• Fullscreen mirror now reserves a small control bar at the bottom with a mouse pad, click buttons, and a keyboard toggle, so it works like a tablet instead of needing an exit-fullscreen round trip to click or type.
• Ember Link now defaults to its lightest quality tier for a snappier first impression on weaker devices (you can still switch to Balanced/Sharp).
• Ember now explicitly asks for Screen Recording and Microphone access shortly after launch instead of relying on an incidental first use to trigger the OS prompt, which wasn't reliably happening.
• Fixed a silent-failure bug in the Features directory (a broken feature used to just close the dialog with no error shown).

Builds on 1.9.2's PIN-stability fix, two-finger scroll, and stronger ad blocking.
